reason: Global project invariants and source-of-truth boundaries for TianChen-RV MLIR.
Architecture boundary: unified TCRV RISC-V MLIR, no high-level compute IR, no independent backend dialect per family.
Keep tcrv.exec orchestration-only while selected RVV computation stays in extension family ops.
RVV extension family ownership, plugin locality, and EmitC/intrinsic emission constraints.
Common plugin interface and registry boundary for family-owned lowering/emission.
Selected variant state, legality, and dispatch expectations for selected route consumption.
Lowering/runtime handoff and artifact/source/header/object emission contract.
Extension family op to EmitC/intrinsic route and direct descriptor exporter quarantine.
Focused lit/FileCheck, C++ tests, e2e, and evidence discipline for compiler behavior changes.
